items.content: Culinary Institute of Mexico (ICUM) Alumnus Network. This is Carlos's primary professional network, used for sourcing talent, sharing industry insights, and staying updated on culinary trends in Mexico.

Mextrópoli - Mexico City's Urbanism and Architecture Festival. Carlos attends this annually for inspiration, particularly interested in how urban planning and design intersect with food systems and community.

Agroecología Mexicana Collective. This group provides Carlos with access to rare, heirloom, and sustainably grown Mexican ingredients, crucial for his innovative tasting menus. He uses it to coordinate special orders and learn about cultivation techniques.

Vintage Mezcal Auctions (Online & Select Boutiques). Carlos actively participates in these to expand his personal collection and source unique bottles for Raíz's beverage program. He uses them to track market value and discover rare expressions.

Rooftop Garden Supply Co. - Mexico City. This is his go-to supplier for specialized planters, organic soils, and heirloom herb seeds tailored for urban rooftop environments. He uses them for seasonal planting and pest management advice.

Mexican Football Federation (FMF) Youth Coaching Resources. Carlos uses these online materials and forums to plan drills, understand player development, and connect with other youth coaches for the team he manages.
